![][image1]

# Moving Muscle \<\> Branch Solution Overview

## Created for Moving Muscle by Branch \- May 15, 2026

# Overview

Moving Muscle will integrate Branch’s payment technology to enable instant payouts for its users. Through this partnership, users will have two payment options:

* Branch Wallet – instant and free   
* Branch Direct – instant direct-to-debit ($2 or 2% fee)  

Users will select their preferred payment method during onboarding or within payment settings in the Moving Muscle app. Payments will be processed daily via API-triggered disbursements based on approved shift completion.

This document covers technical details needed to support an integration between Moving Muscle and Branch.

See also:

* [Rocketlane Project Plan](https://launch.branchapp.com/projects/1200038/plan/timeline)  
* [SOW](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1o5Ii8S4wB9tfwMdIkXSZoWWb2Pmrg9ml_Ftqex5a6TI/edit?tab=t.0)  
* [Screen Design Wireframes](https://www.figma.com/design/9K9quEGdcJZvy86hkpunj7/Moving-Muscle-Screen-Designs?node-id=0-1&t=M0btOhoKac1Td1A3-1)

# Client UI Screen Designs

Branch has created onboarding [screen design wireframes](https://www.figma.com/design/9K9quEGdcJZvy86hkpunj7/Moving-Muscle-Screen-Designs?node-id=0-1&t=M0btOhoKac1Td1A3-1) that Client can use to build the user experience in their own application/web platform to kick off onboarding. 

Client’s screen designs for Branch are to be approved by Branch before proceeding with the API build. 

* ***Note:*** The copy provided in the wireframes is legally approved by Branch. If Client opts to use the copy provided, it will reduce the review process.

---

# API Workflows

## Employee Create Integration Guide

Branch’s API docs provide technical detail required to stand up our integration: [Employee Create Integration Guide](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/docs/employee-create). The documentation walks you through each step of the workflow from onboarding a worker through successful payout.  

## Onboarding details specific to this project are outlined below:

### **Onboarding**

Workers will have the option to opt in for Branch after completing initial onboarding within the Client’s platform. Once applicable data is available, the Client will call the [CreateEmployee Endpoint](https://docs.branchapp.com/reference/create-employee), adding the worker to the org roster within Branch.

Data Included in the CreateEmployee API Call:

* Org ID (specific to each client)  
* Worker ID  
* Group ID (Location Name)  
* First Name  
* Last Name  
* Email  
* Phone

After roster data is successfully added, workers who select Branch will be provided with an org-specific onboarding link (see [Environment Settings](#bookmark=id.dldxi2mhsxdk) for the onboarding URL). 

**Recommendation**: To pre-fill roster information for the worker during onboarding, append the worker\_id parameter to the onboarding URL. Example: 

https://onboarding.branchapp.com/?org\_id={{OrgUUID}}\&worker\_id={{workerID}}

Upon clicking the link, workers will be redirected to the Branch onboarding workflow to make payment selection (Branch Wallet vs Branch Direct), W-9 Collection, and complete account setup.  

**W-9 Collection & TIN Verification**

* Worker will provide W-9 info and e-delivery consent  
* Branch will run TIN verification. Results will be returned async via webhooks when available. The outcome of the TIN check will not impact Branch account setup.   
  * If successful, Branch will trigger a [TIN\_VERIFICATION\_MATCHED](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/docs/tin-verification-matched) webhook to Moving Muscle indicating the success  
  * If failed, Branch will trigger a [TIN\_VERIFICATION\_FAILED](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/docs/tin-verification-failed) webhook to Moving Muscle indicating the failure and communicate to the user that they need to correct the info in the Branch web application

Following W9 collection, workers will choose their payment method and complete setup. Once setup is complete, Branch will send a webhook ([PAYMENT\_PROFILE\_ACTIVATED](https://docs.branchapp.com/docs/payment-profile-activated)) back to Client notifying them that the worker has completed setting up their payment method and their profile is in a fundable state.  Upon receiving the webhook, Client will enable the Branch payment profile and change the status within Client to active. 

***NOTICE**: Branch will return a signal indicating either a TIN Match or TIN Failed, and it will be Moving Muscles’ choice how to handle these signals.* 

* *For example, Moving Muscle could choose to hold payouts until TIN verification passes, or proceed with payouts even if verification fails*

 *Onboarding sequence diagram*   
*![][image2]*

### **Initial Roster Sync**

Branch needs to create roster records for all existing employees within the Client system before launch

* Client can send Branch a roster file for import OR  
* Client batches CreateEmployee calls for each existing employee record 

### **Roster Updates / Removals**

In the event roster information changes, or a worker is no longer affiliated with your organization, the [Update Employee](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/reference/update-employee) and [Delete Employee](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/reference/delete-employee) endpoints should be used to maintain accurate roster information in Branch. 

### **Updating Payment Methods**

If a worker has an active Payment profile in Branch, Client should surface an option to manage their Branch account, redirecting the worker to the org-specific onboarding URL. From there, workers can access their account and/or choose to set up another payment profile. 

### **Account Deactivation and Reactivation**

The [PAYMENT\_PROFILE\_DEACTIVATED](https://docs.branchapp.com/docs/payment-profile-deactivated) webhook will be used to notify Client if a worker’s payment method is deactivated and no longer fundable. Upon receipt, Client will disable payouts for the worker. Client will listen for the [PAYMENT\_PROFILE\_ACTIVATED](https://docs.branchapp.com/docs/payment-profile-activated) webhook indicating that the worker’s new or reactivated payment method is now active and payments can be re-enabled.

![][image3]

## Disbursements

### **Create Disbursements**

1. Earnings and payout amounts are tracked by Client  
2. Client sends the payment info to Branch by calling the [Create Disbursement (V2)](https://docs.branchapp.com/reference/create-disbursement-v2) endpoint  
   1. Worker ID  
   2. Amount  
   3. Type \- *i.e. “DEPOSIT”*  
   4. Worker Group \- *A grouping for the worker to identify customers, business unit, location, region, etc. This field is optional.*  
   5. Description  
   6. ExternalID \- *Client’s unique identifier for disbursement*  
   7. OrgID \- *Provided by Branch*  
3. Branch covers the funds and pushes the amount into the worker’s selected Branch payment method (Branch wallet or directly to a personal debit card) instantly.  
4. Branch will initiate a same-day ACH pull from the Client’s account on file to cover any disbursements paid out from the previous ACH window.

![][image4]

### **Disbursement Failures**

In the event a disbursement fails, Client is responsible for taking the appropriate action to ensure workers receive payment.

* Client to establish disbursement failure action plan

**HTTP Status Codes**

| Status Code | Condition | Action Item |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 200 | The disbursement already exists or its status is CANCELED or SKIPPED   | N/A |
| 201 | The disbursement does not already exist and its status is SCHEDULED or COMPLETED   | N/A |
| 202 | The disbursement status is PENDING or FAILED  | See reason\_code action item |
| 400 | A static request validation is incorrect or no invoice configuration is found for the request   | If static request validation failed, inspect the response and fix the request accordingly. If no invoice configuration was found, then contact your CSM. |
| 429 | Too many actual requests are being sent to the API OR the org has exceeded their daily disbursement limit. | Contact CSM about potentially increasing the rate limit and/or daily disbursement limit. |
| 500 | Unexpected Error | Reach out to Branch with any additional information that can be provided. |

### 

**Disbursement FAILED Reason Codes**

| Reason Code | Status | Description | Suggested Action |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| payout\_pending | PENDING | Disbursement is still in progress | Poll for status updates every \~10 seconds by sending the create disbursement call with the same transaction ID. If retry: TRUE and disbursement is PENDING or COMPLETED: Call will act as a GET FAILED:  Disbursement will be retried If retry: FALSE, call will act as a GET Contact Branch support if still PENDING after \~90 seconds. |
| amount\_zero | COMPLETED | Payout was recorded with an amount of $0 | Log for potential system errors |
| retry\_period\_elapsed | SKIPPED | The disbursement already existed and is too old to be attempted again | A new payout will need to be created to replace the expired one |
| retry\_limit\_exceeded | SKIPPED | The disbursement has been retried the max number of allowed attempts | A new payout will need to be created to replace the expired one |
| likely\_match\_found | SKIPPED | The disbursement was not attempted because another disbursement was identified as a duplicate | Review payout to ensure its not a duplicate, update metadata to be unique and resend |
| worker\_not\_found | FAILED | A worker with the provided id was not found on the active roster | Double check the worker ID to make sure that the worker ID has had a wallet or card successfully created. |
| payment\_profile\_not\_found | FAILED | No destination account could be found for the provided worker | Pay user via non-Branch payment mechanism and/or prompt them to finish set up for Direct/Wallet |
| payment\_profile\_suspended  | FAILED | The destination account is not payable due to suspension | Worker needs to fix their account then org can retry disbursement. |
| payment\_profile\_not\_active | FAILED | The destination account is not payable because it is closed or otherwise inactive | Stop sending disbursements for this worker. Direct user to account for details or to request reopening. |
| payment\_profile\_fraudulent | FAILED | The user associated with the provided ID’s wallet is permanently suspended and not payable | User’s account is not payable due to fraud. Pay user via non-Branch payment mechanism. |
| transfer\_failed | FAILED | An error occurred while issuing the funds to the worker  | Retry won’t work. Reach out to Support and/or Account Manager for details |
| amount\_exceeds\_org\_single\_disbursement\_limit | FAILED | The amount would exceed the organization’s limit for a single disbursement | If payment amount is correct, reach out to Support and/or your Account Manager to adjust the payout limit configuration  |
| amount\_exceeds\_org\_daily\_disbursement\_limit | FAILED | The amount would exceed the organization’s daily limit for disbursements | Wait 24 hours to send additional payouts or reach out to Support and/or Account manager to review org daily limit |
| amount\_exceeds\_worker\_daily\_disbursement\_limit | FAILED | The amount would exceed the worker’s daily limit for disbursements | Wait 24 hours to send additional payouts or reach out to Support and/or Account manager to review worker payout limit |
| amount\_does\_not\_cover\_user\_fees | FAILED | The fee to be charged to the worker exceeds or is equal to the disbursement amount | Allow additional funds to accumulate before sending payout so that it exceeds minimum user-paid fee |
| unexpected\_error | FAILED | Something unexpected occurred.  | Retry the payout. If the problem persists reach out to your Support and/or your Account Manager |

### **Disbursement Reversals**

Branch supports reversing a completed disbursement via the [Create Disbursement Reversal](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/reference/create-disbursement-reversal-v2) endpoint. 

**Items to Note**

* Reversals are only supported for payouts to a Branch Wallet. Branch Direct payouts are unsupported.   
* Disbursements can only be reversed within 90 days of payout.  
* Partial reversals are supported. Although, full reversals are recommended where possible.   
* Reversal attempts will fail if there are insufficient funds available to cover the requested reversal amount. 

---

# Testing (Sandbox)

During development, Branch provides you a sandbox environment to test integrating with the Branch API.

After the Client system is configured to receive Branch Webhook notifications, the Branch sandbox environment can be used to conduct testing. For webhook configuration details, please refer to [Environment Settings](#bookmark=id.dldxi2mhsxdk). 

## **Webhook & Sandbox Integration Testing**

**Webhook Testing**

Once your system is configured to receive Branch Webhook notifications (refer to [Environment Settings](#environment-settings) for configuration details), you can use the Branch sandbox to conduct testing.

* To learn how to simulate webhooks in the sandbox environment, see [here](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/docs/webhook-implementation#use-the-webhook-postman-collection-to-trigger-sandbox-webhook-events).

**Sandbox Integration Testing**

See [Moving Muscle - Test Scenarios](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/0/d/1UHYg9wtMBbMwPrKRtILHFqC7DR6qJwrJ1FAl_TJOlA8/edit)  . Moving Muscle will provide recorded demos for each requested scenario to pass sandbox certification.

### **Worker Onboarding via Sandbox**

Branch offers the ability to create payment profiles in Sandbox to assist with end-to-end onboarding and disbursement testing.

To assist with testing, Branch has supplied test credentials: [Dummy Numbers](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UHYg9wtMBbMwPrKRtILHFqC7DR6qJwrJ1FAl_TJOlA8/edit?gid=1032450125#gid=1032450125). It is important the test credentials are used only ONCE to avoid conflicts with existing accounts. Branch recommends tracking which accounts have been used directly in the provided spreadsheet. 

Prior to moving to production, Branch will certify Client’s integration in Sandbox. Here are the test scenarios Branch will validate for certification: [Moving Muscle - Test Scenarios](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/0/d/1UHYg9wtMBbMwPrKRtILHFqC7DR6qJwrJ1FAl_TJOlA8/edit)

**Steps to create an account in Sandbox:**

1. First add a user by calling the [CreateEmployee](https://docs.branchapp.com/reference/createemployee) endpoint in sandbox   
2. Within the [Pay Admin Sandbox Portal](https://branch-pay-admin-sandbox.branchapp.com/), you can confirm the record was added successfully  
3. Access the onboarding link and begin the sign-up process using the provided test credentials. **Notice**:   
   1. **When prompted to confirm a One Time Passcode (OTP), select Phone**. The test phone numbers are set up with static PINs to bypass SMS verification.  
   2. It is recommended to use an Incognito window for all sandbox testing. If logged into Pay Admin in Sandbox, you may run into authentication issues during onboarding when using the same browser session.  
4. W9 Collection  
   1. Use the preconfigured values from the test account sheet above. The TIN result will depend on the SSN used:   
      1. SSNs ending in 1,2,3 will result in a mismatch  
      2. SSNs ending in 0,6,7,8,9 will result in a match  
      3. SSNs ending in 4,5 will not trigger a TIN verification  
   2. Please note Sandbox TIN verification results are typically returned within minutes. In some cases, it may take up to 24 hours.   
5. Wallet Onboarding  
   1. Use the preconfigured values from the test account sheet above  
   2. Branch does not run any KYC checks on the PII provided in Sandbox (name, DOB, address, etc.) so you’re free to supply any values you choose beyond SSN, Email, and Phone Number.  
6. Direct Onboarding  
   1. Input test debit card number from list provided [HERE](https://developers.tabapay.com/reference/sandbox-test-cases-and-cards). Use any of the listed debit cards along with a fake expiration date in the future, and any 3 digit CVV (with the exception of 999\)  
   2. **Important items to note:**   
      1. Card type must be debit for a successful response  
      2. Using a CVV of 999 will generate an invalid CVV response  
7. Once onboarding is complete, the Payment\_Profile\_Activated webhook will be triggered

**NOTICE:** Clients can simulate the onboarding process by triggering webhook events in the sandbox environment. Detailed instructions are available in Branch’s API documentation [here](https://docs.branchapp.com/branch-developer/docs/webhook-implementation#use-the-webhook-postman-collection-to-trigger-sandbox-webhook-events).

### **Disbursements via Sandbox**

**Steps to create:**

1. Call the [CreateDisbursement](https://docs.branchapp.com/reference/create-disbursement-v2) endpoint for a user with an active payment profile   
2. Within the [Pay Admin Sandbox Portal](https://branch-pay-admin-sandbox.branchapp.com/), you can confirm the payment was sent successfully 

**Important items to note:** 

* Money doesn’t actually move in the sandbox environment  
* Wallet Payments  
  * Any values can be used for testing  
* Direct Payments   
  * Single disbursement limit to a Branch Direct account in the sandbox environment is set to $0.25 max with a daily limit of $10.00.  
  * Branch Direct disbursements have a minimum fee of **$2.00** that is automatically applied by Branch.   
    * Client should test with disbursement amounts that are $0.25 or less *after* the fee is applied to avoid failures.   
    * Testing anything under the minimum fee will generate errors as it will not cover the minimum fee. 

---

# Appendix: Branch Environments

Branch environment detail and limitations can be found in Branch’s developer API docs [here](https://docs.branchapp.com/docs/environments). 

## Environment Settings {#environment-settings}

The following table outlines the key configuration elements for each Branch environment: 

| Setting | Sandbox (QA/Integration) | Production |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Org ID | 100832 | Coming soon |
| Onboarding URL | https://onboarding-sandbox.branchapp.com/?org\_id=4553a091-583a-4c8c-9b8f-cd35bba5a364 | Coming soon |
| Access URL | [https://sandbox.branchapp.com/v1/](https://sandbox.branchapp.com/v1/) | [https://api.branchapp.com/v1](https://api.branchapp.com/v1) |
| Access URL for Disbursement APIs | [https://sandbox.branchapp.com/v2/](https://sandbox.branchapp.com/v2/) | [https://api.branchapp.com/v2](https://api.branchapp.com/v2) |
| Webhooks | All applicable events configured for publishing. Branch is sending to:  \[Provided by Moving Muscle\] | All applicable events configured for publishing. Branch is sending to: \[Provided by Moving Muscle\] |
| API KEYS | Make sure you are using SANDBOX keys | Make sure you are using PRODUCTION keys |
| Test User Accounts | See [Testing (Sandbox)](#bookmark=id.77t73rnac5w0) above for more details | Live User Accounts should be set up with real data for users (SSN, DOB, etc) for passing KYC  |
| KYC/Fraud Check  | Fixed response | Live |
